# uuid16(_:)

**Type Method**

Creates a new 16-bit IOBluetoothSDPUUID with the given UUID16

## Declaration

```swift
class func uuid16(_ uuid16: BluetoothSDPUUID16) -> Self!
```

## Parameters

- **uuid16**: A scalar representing a 16-bit UUID

## Return Value

Returns the new IOBluetoothSDPUUID object.
